name: whiteboard-me
description: Whiteboard-Me — research-grounded work-life map: a whiteboard-sketch infographic of who you are professionally today (what you do, who you work with, values, tools, what you're building), grounded in the owner OS and rendered as crisp HTML/SVG — never a one-shot AI image. Includes deterministic ink-sketch portrait pipeline, business/entity mode, and an Instagram teaser variant. The shareable wedge.
